---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement to Dossier
labels: enhancement
---

<!-- Thanks for suggesting a feature. Please open the issue before opening a PR so we can discuss scope.
     See CONTRIBUTING.md for what's in scope and what isn't. -->

## Problem

<!-- What job-search problem does this solve? Who hits it? One or two sentences. Example:
"When evaluating roles at startups I can't easily tell if a company is pre-seed or Series D. This affects
the risk / upside dimension of the eval, but I have to look it up manually every time." -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- How should it work? Describe the user-visible behavior — not the implementation. Example:
"Add a 'funding_stage' field to the eval frontmatter, populated by Mode 4 (company research) using
Apollo or Crunchbase MCP if available, else asking the user." -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- What else did you think about? Example:
"I considered just adding it to the notes field, but the scoring rubric needs to query it for the
risk/upside dimension so a structured field is better." -->

## Is this in scope?

<!-- Quick self-check, from CONTRIBUTING.md. Delete the ones that don't apply. -->

- [ ] Fixes a bug or gap in an existing workflow mode
- [ ] Improves eval quality, calibration, or honesty
- [ ] Adds a new scoring dimension or refines an existing one
- [ ] Adds a new example artifact or template
- [ ] Improves test coverage or CI infrastructure
- [ ] Improves documentation
- [ ] Something else (describe below)

## Additional Context

<!-- Links, screenshots, prior art from other tools. -->
